name: coach-buddy
description: Thinking partner for Agile coaches — install into Claude Code, Cursor, or use in a Claude Chat Project

scripts.build:plugin: node scripts/validate-plugin.js && rm -f "$TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin" && cd plugins/coach-buddy && zip -r "$TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin" . -x '*.DS_Store' && cp "$TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin" ../../coach-buddy.plugin && cd ../.. && echo '✅ coach-buddy.plugin ready'
scripts.build:plugin:ci: node scripts/validate-plugin.js && rm -f /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin && cd plugins/coach-buddy && zip -r /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin . -x '*.DS_Store' && cp /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin ../../coach-buddy.plugin && cd ../.. && echo '✅ coach-buddy.plugin ready'
